titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Amir Ibn Naim Al-Qummi
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Amir Ibn Naim Al-Qummi

segments: ه عن عامر بن نعيم القمّيّ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن عامر بن نعيم القمّيّ‌.
arabic.text: ه عن عامر بن نعيم القمّيّ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن عامر بن نعيم القمّيّ‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Amir ibn Naim Al-Qummi has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr, from Amir ibn Naim Al-Qummi.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Amir ibn Naim Al-Qummi has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr, from Amir ibn Naim Al-Qummi.
